column17: 6 x6 m harvest boxes (placed diagnoally) (or 3x3 boxes if field was too small). TZ farmers do not immediately shell their maize, so we hired casuals to do this for some of the fields. We then generate a predictive model using shelled and unshelled maize weights, controlling for hybrid seed usage, collected across all AEZs. Once we sample enough farmers (~60 per AEZ) to achieve a reasonably predictive model (R-squared >=0.88) we then use the model coefficients to adjust our unshelled maize weights to predict our shelled maize harvests.
column19: 6 x6 m harvest boxes (placed diagnoally) (or 3x3 boxes if field was too small). TZ farmers do not immediately shell their maize, so we hired casuals to do this for some of the fields. We then generate a predictive model using shelled and unshelled maize weights, controlling for hybrid seed usage, collected across all AEZs. Once we sample enough farmers (~60 per AEZ) to achieve a reasonably predictive model (R-squared >=0.88) we then use the model coefficients to adjust our unshelled maize weights to predict our shelled maize harvests.
